response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or navigation systems, and his resume emphasizes JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang over the required C++/Rust core competencies, making his fit uncertain despite relevant domain exposure.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and systems
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practices
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing or navigation pipelines
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, not low-latency geospatial data systems
Lacks clear evidence of distributed systems or fault-tolerant routing tile infrastructure
